title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Honeywell India Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Honeywell India Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? Honeywell India Asia Pacific Associates in Chennai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Honeywell India Asia Pacific Associates:
Honeywell India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Honeywell India Asia Pacific Associates!
